message:
fix(e2e): handle TrackedPermit::send fallibility in obligation tracking tests

Update two test sites in runtime_e2e.rs to call .expect("send") on the
Result returned by TrackedPermit::send(), adapting to the prior change
that made send() return Result to handle receiver-dropped channels:

- e2e_obligation_tracked_channel_commit: permit.send(7).expect("send")
- e2e_obligation_cancel_mid_reserve: .send(1).expect("send") with
  reformatted method chain for readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
